zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley於1494年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley34歲，母親Cecily Willoughby31歲。他於大約1512年與Lady Cecily Grey結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1553年9月18日在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年59歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley于1494年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley34岁，母亲Cecily Willoughby31岁。他于大约1512年与Lady Cecily Grey结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1553年9月18日在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年59岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley was born in 1494, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley, was 34 and his mother, Cecily Willoughby, was 31. He married Lady Cecily Grey about 1512. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 18 September 1553, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley est né en 1494, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Cecily Willoughby, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecily Grey environ 1512. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1553, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England: Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley 1494 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley 34 und seine Mutter Cecily Willoughby 31. Er hat um 1512 Lady Cecily Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 18. September 1553 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley è nato il nel 1494 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Willoughby, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecily Grey circa 1512. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1553, nel Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudleyが1494年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudleyは34歳，母Cecily Willoughbyは31歳であった。約1512年にLady Cecily Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1553年9月18日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで59歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley(이)가 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Willoughby(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1512년 Lady Cecily Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1553년 9월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley nasceu em 1494, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Willoughby, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecily Grey aproximadamente 1512. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1553, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley родился в 1494 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Willoughby, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecily Grey около 1512 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 18 сентября 1553 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Cecily Grey aproximadamente 1512. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1553, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
